^(content_disposition)$.description: Content disposition for the blob payload.

^(content_encoding)$.description: Content encoding for the blob payload.

^(content_type)$.description: MIME type for the blob payload.

^(if_match)$.description: Require the blob to match the provided ETag before writing.

^(if_none_match)$.description: Require the blob to *not* match the provided ETag before writing.

^(if_not_exist)$.description: Require the blob does not already exist before writing.

bucket.description: Bucket to write blob (may be optional).

contentDisposition.description: Content disposition for the blob payload.

contentEncoding.description: Content encoding for the blob payload.

contentType.description: MIME type for the blob payload.

ifMatch.description: Require the blob to match the provided ETag before writing.

ifNoneMatch.description: Require the blob to *not* match the provided ETag before writing.

ifNotExist.description: Require the blob does not already exist before writing.
